Flat concept inventory:
- Multilingual Evaluation of MLLMs | papers: 0d4b5c9a071557f4eb12f63f785dbc89071d4272; 879a7f5abdb7ab803d48172d4f0830965f989d46; 64384525318f934fa085de86badc24403487d38a; 1006d191e9eb5b4dbc35fc0bb389328ddc75cba7; 62ad7ea9467bbcdbfe325b9ee561cab3908e4583; dfbfa21a93c3164ae8a033398c8de42b03b1b84d; 71c3c3c262239adb89b41d4c80e342cd24f11ef3; 72f1e6509bcfeabeb33e31e10c6926dab05f3e8b; dfd8944d39b378489b878d6e105d040fa0e524db; 789b8487da7188442085983caba3ffaae05531e9; 9e9d919c1de684ca42c8b581ec62c7aa685f431e; 2e347a977f14eca7cc5bbbb4c71145b75637340c; 89689059d0cdcb52d7fbb6007ab953db22936a90; dee01ce21fec1d9731a922e980b598f33b4e264f; 83a820fe19944a7621238b8cfcc0b8a0cbc0f4b6; dffdd1686218128e0284e45c24fdbc36976f31c1; b64b2d28e00e1bdf35393856707cbd133058abab; af8b26c3f10acfe86aa0a07d11ce4653e1dbf1cc; fec9e5449c5a03792ee7fc1875e57a6efcb97e1e; 87c0b759783d919539860a0de7bb13fd0879687e; c4cb9f0145cebb169fbdf235fb1f76e1e5b82e72; 72e05fac8cf01593f70c63e16385a7bf6fd0fe09; 764fc56883bf83392cac99a7b5a264ac9fe2cdc5; c44622a46fac5fcd6296358d8c0e06efc93a7767; 0ed0e74d84f2523cdbf498844d00773217f6074f; 37cbf656ca8b76f29684c37c2ee43118d5bd8a8c; acf3e66d4e046dc021e75f223a681d72203efa61

- Interpretability of Multilingual Capabilities | papers: e88efdfc05d0d8832b2ded7af9c8ececdd03e58d; de16e22ddd79fe45df535bcde21566d972187baf; 0b4f0f6b04476c4f2cdfeabf99d4b835227f0bb2; 3841840b786a387d18a3ddfc80c9360162b4949c; 90f6eb019a8126e54c6e6799a3bfbc2935ff7f26; fe5119a306010cfd05bd367b5e6223c258cd1c45; 96edfa3441bb3624ea2b8bdfc5eec2c87efa9637; 9a52c442f5ffb9429f76723f0a1fa5b33ff76710; cfe8ec7a183ed548db1a862e38908343cefb94c7; 1234fcc1577a32b829d2886fdf68375b9d4525e9; 24a4657b614a4a3037bf045cc1ded0548771c148; c0a54963b0689fa7d76fda1063b65003c769d9b7; d0e2e6c98a7b2c8360aa091c0dc0a270edec8468; c207133adfbdd3e678606ba37e1964b061b73b52; fcfc9648561a221750b8085790ad9ba1bebb1800; 3301604a6b138fb8cadb37df2859fdee52ec5a2f; 708dcd8456426cd609c89a86344e0007c04c80bf; 468d1e2d75a23fecaf96fe65d8b01ff35ea5d0bd; e7d493e9390ad5ebd899ffc83740ac8f078c7a61; f3d5f9a6e4dd61962736988937100b2168f5ba1c; 4387ae27cadc05aa708dc293cfadd1ab41079ea2; 2f9a33496079585ed2ed0d8118ec28e3f609c100

- Applications of MLLMs | papers: 972b2c4dcb9712d5cd1c5d9f06a5ac0c5e084350; 96c2824547ff669653e8d058da49dbc8c71ad9c9; 5459cab5dcf3c65c6b4f63b3d9f1e376f722bbcb; c43d9cade31600400a0f62beb5bbcc1b548e009e; 1e43c7084bdcb6b3102afaf301cce10faead2702; d8e375017de9fd2c875b6925cbd6c64519a9c558; c9dff8253b2e776abf363d0a4836abcaf64ee327; bce55193d9a887ad00774a9134df08cd521a85ae; ea72fb2a0d340f9d14fbcf300cd5f5fbbe1050bb; ebc502a4d173f6550a8cd6384cb06f2c43c7c1a3; 0f4780f3f42dbe9755d54495ae17244cc88a7483; c86de166504e73465a64a8ac89335d63cf800b1c; 1b527b2b0c9e5c40394d7aff3c8b83f7941b78de; a30f912f8c5e2a2bfb06351d4578e1ba3fa37896; 0fe2636446cd686830da3d971b31a004d6094b3c; 9ada8fa11b1cdece31f253acae50b62df8d5f823; 5288b9f3a9f575543f44c39e1d3b78b3ca4c99da; 38115e80d805fb0fb8f090dc88ced4b24be07878; e38a118f18f1b6e1a4e3d3f6fe4838fcdc0af022; bafe023fb072045dc0cd50316382a61c8dcb9fae; 0646bb09db4d1ba24150e69b71edcd4aff691b3c; b32a6f6ef7dd775e0f876b4713ceccebc56e651e; acbdbf49f9bc3f151b93d9ca9a06009f4f6eb269; 5cbe278b65a81602a864184bbca37de91448a5f5; f24dabf3317abaa3d7393ab7d48115f353749bde; 3e4085e5869f1b7959707a1e1d7d273b6057eb4e; 0b0debb710366cdff461938c80763eace1651af6; 5fc1a3a49e8f1d106118b69d1d6be3b6caa23da0; b842b83a7ff5dff8e3b83915d8c15423b6085728; 4eb4055d1ace1022557ccf56f6ec2fdcd2f21cae; dd18782960f9ee4c66b79e1518b342ad3f8d19e7; a3dd7d33dfaa9e02e43d92e900cba01f52d8c4b9; 77b1f1c6d1658d120456b9046667cf009ceb39ce; 35b142ea69598e6241f0011312128031df55895c; ad2be51acf42f686a8d1de92d7435d84274ee62d; 3fb1818b9ab3f8d36ed3f8329087058f561c05da; eb9b60db6832b00b9932584663bec104d6d415dd; 1eeb5d4b172339a3df6a3fbb0d506ffb860d5081; 1e3e65e7773b7869d9bd7f5394b54199e48195e6; 939629c488543676aeee9ecb953f246e14a13945; 41b360c5b4ae9c5bfcf3891c45319a9e0b3e6d81; 4fd05237af737c58c60e4ca8a745f85013681604; 6806ecad90a778aaa7f6a3cd3a539582d823066c
- MLLMs for Biology and Medicine | papers: 972b2c4dcb9712d5cd1c5d9f06a5ac0c5e084350; 96c2824547ff669653e8d058da49dbc8c71ad9c9; 5459cab5dcf3c65c6b4f63b3d9f1e376f722bbcb; c43d9cade31600400a0f62beb5bbcc1b548e009e; 1e43c7084bdcb6b3102afaf301cce10faead2702; d8e375017de9fd2c875b6925cbd6c64519a9c558; c9dff8253b2e776abf363d0a4836abcaf64ee327; bce55193d9a887ad00774a9134df08cd521a85ae; ea72fb2a0d340f9d14fbcf300cd5f5fbbe1050bb; ebc502a4d173f6550a8cd6384cb06f2c43c7c1a3; 0f4780f3f42dbe9755d54495ae17244cc88a7483; c86de166504e73465a64a8ac89335d63cf800b1c; 1b527b2b0c9e5c40394d7aff3c8b83f7941b78de
- MLLMs for Computer Science | papers: a30f912f8c5e2a2bfb06351d4578e1ba3fa37896; 0fe2636446cd686830da3d971b31a004d6094b3c; 9ada8fa11b1cdece31f253acae50b62df8d5f823; 5288b9f3a9f575543f44c39e1d3b78b3ca4c99da; 38115e80d805fb0fb8f090dc88ced4b24be07878; e38a118f18f1b6e1a4e3d3f6fe4838fcdc0af022; bafe023fb072045dc0cd50316382a61c8dcb9fae; 0646bb09db4d1ba24150e69b71edcd4aff691b3c; b32a6f6ef7dd775e0f876b4713ceccebc56e651e; acbdbf49f9bc3f151b93d9ca9a06009f4f6eb269; 5cbe278b65a81602a864184bbca37de91448a5f5; f24dabf3317abaa3d7393ab7d48115f353749bde; 3e4085e5869f1b7959707a1e1d7d273b6057eb4e; 0b0debb710366cdff461938c80763eace1651af6; 5fc1a3a49e8f1d106118b69d1d6be3b6caa23da0; b842b83a7ff5dff8e3b83915d8c15423b6085728; 4eb4055d1ace1022557ccf56f6ec2fdcd2f21cae

- MLLMs for Law | papers: 1eeb5d4b172339a3df6a3fbb0d506ffb860d5081; 1e3e65e7773b7869d9bd7f5394b54199e48195e6; 939629c488543676aeee9ecb953f246e14a13945; 41b360c5b4ae9c5bfcf3891c45319a9e0b3e6d81; 4fd05237af737c58c60e4ca8a745f85013681604; 6806ecad90a778aaa7f6a3cd3a539582d823066c
